titleZh: 新《公司法》的外商投资视角
titleEn: The Revised Company Law - A Foreign Investment Perspective
abstractZh: 从外商投资企业与跨境投资安排的角度解读新《公司法》，重点讨论治理结构、注册资本、文件更新及过渡期合规问题。
abstractEn: Reads the revised Company Law through the lens of foreign investment and cross-border structuring, making it useful for the comparative layer as well.
